mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_LOB_DETAIL ( HEADER_ID, NO, FRAGMENT, FRAGMENT_LEN, MEMO ) VALUES ( #{headerId}, #{no}, #{fragment,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{fragmentLen}, #{memo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE T_LOB_HEADER SET TEXT = #{text,jdbcType=CLOB}, TEXT_LEN = #{textLen}, FRAGMENT_COUNT = #{fragmentCount} WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE T_LOB_DETAIL SET NO = #{no}, FRAGMENT = FRAGMENT || TO_CLOB('=>') || #{fragment,jdbcType=CLOB,typeHandler=com.example.dbperf.typehandler.OracleClobStringTypeHandler}, FRAGMENT_LEN = #{fragmentLen}, MEMO = #{memo} WHERE ID = #{id}
